_comment: Ground truth for the contradiction-resolution model comparison (scripts/compare_models.py). Each conflict names two DISTINCT memories by content substring; the correct resolution archives/supersedes the 'outdated' one and keeps the 'authoritative' one. IDs are resolved at runtime (UUIDs are non-deterministic). Substrings verified present + distinct in the agentic_support corpus.

conflicts.name: axis_victoriei_credentials
conflicts.note: README credential summary (523) is stale; the live AXIS GetCredentialList (520) is authoritative.

conflicts.name: openapi_path_count
conflicts.note: The 2026-05-01 pre-change review (35 paths) predates the canceledsimple/CancellationPushData additions (validation reported 'paths':36).
